texto: Nico: I love you.Percy: What?Nico: Did you say something Jason?Jason: What?Nico: You just said you love Percy?Jason: Wait, what? No, I didn't, wait,Percy: Dude. What the Tartarus?Jason: No, Nico's the one who loves you.Nico: *Pushes Jason off the Argo ll*Percy: Did he just-Nico: No proof.Percy: But he just-Nico: No witnesses.Percy: But he just said-Jason: *Flying* Did you just push me off the ship???
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Google que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Nico: I love you.Percy: What?Nico: Did you say something Jason?Jason: What?Nico: You just said yo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, gay, love, com foco em love e nico.
